critic_findings.message: Step 1 missing 'Load lessons corpus' sub-section — no $LESSONS preamble added
Step 2.5 trust-diff guard missing comment confirming .review/lessons/ is covered by ^.review/ regex
Step 3 balanced-tier dispatch prompts missing $LESSONS insertions — 0 found, spec requires >=2
Step 3 thorough-tier dispatch prompts missing $LESSONS insertions — 0 found, spec requires >=4
Step 3 missing $LESSONS re-derivation preamble before first Agent() dispatch — required by skill-isolation rule

failures_details.output:
-    || _fail "no-git-ops: HEAD unchanged" "HEAD changed: $head_before → $head_after"
-
-  [ -f "$captured_path" ] \
-    && _pass "no-git-ops: file exists" \
-    || _fail "no-git-ops: file exists" "captured file not found"
+  [ "$head_before" = "$head_after" ] &&
+    _pass "no-git-ops: HEAD unchanged" ||
+    _fail "no-git-ops: HEAD unchanged" "HEAD changed: $head_before → $head_after"
+
+  [ -f "$captured_path" ] &&
+    _pass "no-git-ops: file exists" ||
+    _fail "no-git-ops: file exists" "captured file not found"
 
   local gs_file staged_count
   gs_file="$(mktemp)"
@@ -217,14 +217,14 @@
   trap "rm -f '$gs_file'" RETURN
   git -C "$repo" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null >"$gs_file"
 
-  grep -q "^??" "$gs_file" \
-    && _pass "no-git-ops: new file is untracked" \
-    || _fail "no-git-ops: file untracked" "expected ?? in git status"
+  grep -q "^??" "$gs_file" &&
+    _pass "no-git-ops: new file is untracked" ||
+    _fail "no-git-ops: file untracked" "expected ?? in git status"
 
   staged_count="$(grep -cE '^[AMDR]' "$gs_file" || true)"
-  [ "$staged_count" -eq 0 ] \
-    && _pass "no-git-ops: no staged changes" \
-    || _fail "no-git-ops: no staged" "found $staged_count staged changes"
+  [ "$staged_count" -eq 0 ] &&
+    _pass "no-git-ops: no staged changes" ||
+    _fail "no-git-ops: no staged" "found $staged_count staged changes"
 }
 
 # ─── Runner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
diff ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_lessons_capture_lib.sh.orig ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_lessons_capture_lib.sh
--- ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_lessons_capture_lib.sh.orig
+++ ./plugins/rq/scripts/test_lessons_capture_lib.sh
@@ -77,8 +77,8 @@
   # Usage: _run_capture <lessons-dir> <diff-file> <input-string>
   # Prints stdout (the saved file path). Stderr is suppressed.
   local lessons_dir="$1" diff_file="$2" input="$3"
-  printf '%s' "$input" \
-    | RQ_LESSONS_DIR="$lessons_dir" \
+  printf '%s' "$input" |
+    RQ_LESSONS_DIR="$lessons_dir" \
       RQ_DIFF_FILE="$diff_file" \
       bash "$CAPTURE_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null
 }
